1419 QMI_NAS_SYS_SRV_DOMAIN_PS = 0x02,
1421 QMI_NAS_SYS_SRV_DOMAIN_CS_PS = 0x03,
1423 QMI_NAS_SYS_SRV_DOMAIN_CAMPED = 0x04,
1424} QMI_NAS_service_domain_t;

1432 QMI_NAS_POWER_CYCLE = 0x00,
1434 QMI_NAS_PERMANENT = 0x01,

1441typedef enum {
1443 QMI_NAS_ROAMING_PREF_OFF = 0x01,

1447 QMI_NAS_ROAMING_PREF_NOT_FLASHING = 0x03,

1450} QMI_NAS_roaming_preference_t;

1461} QMI_NAS_network_selection_t;

1468typedef enum {
1470 QMI_NAS_SRV_DOMAIN_PREF_CS_ONLY = 0x00,
1472 QMI_NAS_SRV_DOMAIN_PREF_PS_ONLY = 0x01,
1474 QMI_NAS_SRV_DOMAIN_PREF_CS_PS = 0x02,
1476 QMI_NAS_SRV_DOMAIN_PREF_PS_ATTACH = 0x03,
1478 QMI_NAS_SRV_DOMAIN_PREF_PS_DETACH = 0x04,

1598typedef enum {
1600 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_CDMA2000_1X = (1 << 0),
1602 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_CDMA2000_HRPD = (1 << 1),
1604 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_GSM = (1 << 2),
1606 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_UMTS = (1 << 3),
1608 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_LTE = (1 << 4),
1610 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_TDSCDMA = (1 << 5),
1612 QMI_NAS_RAT_MODE_PREF_NR5G = (1 << 6),
1613} QMI_NAS_RAT_mode_preference_mask_t;
1614
1619typedef enum {
1621 QMI_NAS_NR5G_DISABLE_MODE_NONE = 0,
1623 QMI_NAS_NR5G_DISABLE_MODE_SA = 1,
1625 QMI_NAS_NR5G_DISABLE_MODE_NSA = 2,
1626} QMI_NAS_NR5G_SA_NSA_mode_disable_setting_t;
1627
1633#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_1 (1 << 0)
1635#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_2 (1 << 1)
1637#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_3 (1 << 2),
1639#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_4 (1 << 3),
1641#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_5 (1 << 4),
1643#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_6 (1 << 5),
1645#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_7 (1 << 6),
1647#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_8 (1 << 7),
1649#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_9 (1 << 8),
1651#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_10 (1 << 9),
1653#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_11 (1 << 10),
1655#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_12 (1 << 11),
1657#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_13 (1 << 12),
1659#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_14 (1 << 13),
1660/* Bits 14 to 15 skipped */
1662#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_17 (1 << 16),
1664#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_18 (1 << 17),
1666#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_19 (1 << 18),
1668#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_20 (1 << 19),
1670#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_21 (1 << 20),
1671/* Bit 22 skipped */
1673#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_23 (1 << 22),
1675#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_24 (1 << 23),
1677#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_25 (1 << 24),
1679#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_26 (1 << 25),
1680/* Bits 27 to 28 skipped */
1682#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_28 (1 << 27),
1684#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_29 (1 << 28),
1685/* The following two bitfields are messed... */
1687#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_32 (1 << 29),
1689#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_30 (1 << 31),
1690/* Things look again normal */
1692#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_33 (1 << 32),
1694#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_34 (1 << 33),
1696#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_35 (1 << 34),
1698#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_36 (1 << 35),
1700#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_37 (1 << 36),
1702#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_38 (1 << 37),
1704#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_39 (1 << 38),
1706#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_40 (1 << 39),
1708#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_41 (1 << 40),
1710#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_42 (1 << 41),
1712#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_43 (1 << 42),
1713/* Bits 43 to 44 skipped */
1715#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_46 (1 << 45),
1717#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_47 (1 << 46),
1719#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_48 (1 << 47),
1721#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_49 (1 << 48),
1722/* Bits 49 to 59 skipped */
1724#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_125 (1 << 125),
1726#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_126 (1 << 126),
1728#define QMI_NAS_E_UTRA_OPERATING_BAND_127 (1 << 127),
1729
1734typedef struct {
1736 bool emergency_mode_available;
1738 bool emergency_mode_on;
1740 bool mode_pref_available;
1742 uint16_t mode_pref;
1744 bool band_pref_available;
1746 uint64_t band_pref;
1748 bool roam_pref_available;
1750 enum16_t roam_pref;
1752 bool lte_band_pref_available;
1754 uint64_t lte_band_pref;
1756 bool net_sel_pref_available;
1758 nas_net_sel_pref_t network_selection_preference;
1760 bool chg_duration_available;
1762 enum8_t chg_duration;
1764 bool mnc_inc_pcs_dig_stat;
1766 bool srv_domain_pref_available;
1768 enum32_t srv_domain_pref;
1770 bool gw_acq_order_pref_available;
1772 enum32_t gw_acq_order_pref;
1774 bool acq_order_pref_available;
1776 nas_acq_order_pref_t acq_order_pref;
1778 bool srv_reg_restriction_available;
1780 enum32_t srv_reg_restriction;
1782 bool csg_id_available;
1784 nas_csg_id_t csg_id;
1786 bool rat_available;
1788 enum8_t rat;
1790 bool lte_band_preference_extended_available;
1792 nas_lte_band_pref_ext_t lte_band_preference_extended;
1794 bool nr5g_band_preference_available;
1796 nas_nr5g_band_pref_t nr5g_band_preference;
1798 bool nr5g_sa_nsa_mode_disable_available;
1801 enum32_t nr5g_sa_nsa_mode_disable;
1803 bool nr5g_sa_band_preference_available;
1805 nas_nr5g_band_pref_t nr5g_sa_band_preference;
1807 bool nr5g_nsa_band_preference_available;
1809 nas_nr5g_band_pref_t nr5g_nsa_band_preference;
1810} nas_set_system_selection_preference_t;

1920#define QMI_NAS_MAX_CELLS 9
1921#define QMI_NAS_PLMN_LEN 3
1922
1927typedef struct {
1929 uint8_t plmn[QMI_NAS_PLMN_LEN];
1931 uint8_t tac[3];
1933 uint64_t global_cell_id;
1935 uint16_t pci;
1937 int16_t rsrq;
1939 int16_t rsrp;
1941 int16_t snr;
1942} nas_nr5g_cell_info_t;
1943
1948typedef struct {
1950 uint16_t earfcn;
1952 uint16_t pci;
1954 uint32_t rsrp;
1956 uint32_t rsrq;
1958 int16_t srxlev;
1960 bool cell_is_tdd;
1961} nas_umts_lte_nbr_cell_info_t;
1962
1967typedef struct {
1969 enum32_t wcdma_rrc_state;
1971 uint8_t umts_lte_nbr_cell_size;
1973 nas_umts_lte_nbr_cell_info_t umts_lte_nbr_cells[QMI_NAS_MAX_CELLS];
1974} nas_wcdma_info_lte_neighbor_cell_t;
1975
1980typedef struct {
1982 uint16_t psc;
1985 int16_t cpich_rscp;
1990 int16_t cpich_ecno;
1994 int16_t srxlev;
1995} nas_wcdma_cell_info_t;
1996
2001typedef struct {
2003 uint16_t uarfcn;
2005 uint8_t cell_resel_priority;
2007 uint16_t thresh_Xhigh;
2009 uint16_t threshXlow;
2011 uint8_t wcdma_cells_size;
2013 nas_wcdma_cell_info_t wcdma_cells[QMI_NAS_MAX_CELLS];
2014} nas_lte_wcdma_cell_info_t;
2015
2020typedef struct {
2022 bool ue_in_idle;
2024 uint8_t lte_wcdma_cells_size;
2026 nas_lte_wcdma_cell_info_t lte_wcdma_cells[QMI_NAS_MAX_CELLS];
2027} nas_lte_info_neighboring_wcdma_t;
2028
2033typedef struct {
2035 uint16_t arfcn;
2037 bool band_1900;
2040 bool cell_id_valid;
2043 uint8_t bsic_id;
2045 int16_t rssi;
2047 int16_t srxlev;
2048} nas_gsm_cell_info_t;
2049
2054typedef struct {
2056 uint8_t cell_resel_priority;
2058 uint8_t thresh_gsm_high;
2060 uint8_t thresh_gsm_low;

2068} nas_lte_gsm_cell_info_t;
2069
2074typedef struct {
2076 bool ue_in_idle;

2080 nas_lte_gsm_cell_info_t lte_gsm_cells[QMI_NAS_MAX_CELLS];
